access_events.reason: Parser status ambiguous; no evidence released.
Parser status ambiguous; no evidence released.

final.rationale: Release is not supported because neither validated controlling metric was supplied: both evidence requests returned ambiguous access responses with no evidence ID. The visible 12% raw retention and 1,000 raw rows are explicitly non-controlling, so they cannot establish bot-adjusted 30-day retention of at least 10% and eligible sample size of at least 500. Repeated inability to obtain the authoritative record warrants escalation rather than release.
final.uncertainty: The bot-adjusted 30-day retention and eligible sample size for synthetic segment S-9 remain unknown; either, both, or neither threshold may be satisfied.

requests.expected_value_basis: If both validated values meet their thresholds, the segment can be released; if either fails, it must not be released, and authoritative values may determine whether hold or escalation is appropriate.
requests.intent: The release rule depends jointly on bot-adjusted 30-day retention being at least 10% and eligible sample size being at least 500; the visible raw metrics are not controlling.

parser_interpretation.interpreted_scope: Synthetic segment S-9, 30-day retention window, bot-adjusted retention and corresponding eligible sample size only.

requests.raw_request: Provide the validated controlling metrics report for synthetic segment S-9, specifically its bot-adjusted 30-day retention and eligible sample size, including the evidence ID.
requests.requested_scope: Synthetic segment S-9, 30-day retention window, bot-adjusted retention and corresponding eligible sample size only.

requests.expected_value_basis: Release is supported only if the validated bot-adjusted retention is at least 10% and the validated eligible sample size is at least 500; a value below either threshold prevents release, while unavailable or inconclusive controlling values may require hold or escalation.
requests.intent: Both controlling metrics are required to apply the disclosed release rule, and the prior ambiguous access response did not provide usable evidence.

parser_interpretation.interpreted_scope: One validated controlling-metrics record for synthetic segment S-9 covering only bot-adjusted 30-day retention and corresponding eligible sample size for the applicable 30-day window.

requests.raw_request: Provide one authoritative validated metrics record for synthetic segment S-9 that states both the bot-adjusted 30-day retention and the corresponding eligible sample size, with its evidence ID; this is a retry because the prior access response was ambiguous and supplied no evidence.
requests.requested_scope: One validated controlling-metrics record for synthetic segment S-9 covering only bot-adjusted 30-day retention and corresponding eligible sample size for the applicable 30-day window.
